unit.t1.name: Iron Shield
unit.t1.desc: A tanker who guards the front line with a heavy shield. Blocks penetrating attacks and absorbs tile effects.
unit.f1.name: Assault
unit.f1.desc: A fighter who charges in a straight line to knock back enemies. Has a rush skill combining movement and attack.
unit.r1.name: Archer
unit.r1.desc: A ranger who fires fire arrows from a distance. Burns tiles with fire-attribute attacks.
weapon.tanker_basic.name: Shield Strike
weapon.tanker_basic.desc: Basic melee attack with a shield.
weapon.tanker_shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
weapon.tanker_shield_bash.desc: A powerful shield strike that knocks back the target.
weapon.fighter_basic.name: Sword Strike
weapon.fighter_basic.desc: Basic melee slash with a sword.
weapon.fighter_rush.name: Rush Slash
weapon.fighter_rush.desc: Charge in a straight line, striking and knocking back the target.
weapon.ranger_basic.name: Arrow Shot
weapon.ranger_fire_arrow.name: Fire Arrow
weapon.ranger_fire_arrow.desc: A fire-attribute arrow that inflicts the fire effect and converts the tile to fire on hit.
skill.shield_defend.name: Shield Defend
skill.shield_defend.desc: Passively blocks penetrating and beam attack propagation. Absorbs tile effects for use in attacks.
skill.fighter_rush.name: Rush
skill.fighter_rush.desc: Charge up to 3 tiles in a straight line, striking and knocking back the target. One use.
skill.ranger_fire_arrow.name: Fire Arrow
effect.freeze.name: Freeze
effect.freeze.desc: All actions are blocked. Removed after 1 turn.
effect.fire.name: Fire
effect.fire.desc: Deals 1 damage per turn. Lasts 3 turns. Can be removed by extinguishing.
effect.acid.name: Acid
effect.acid.desc: Deals 1 damage per turn. Applied to unit and tile simultaneously. Doubles incoming damage.
effect.water.name: Water
effect.water.desc: Removed automatically when the unit moves.
effect.sand.name: Sand
effect.sand.desc: Removed automatically when the unit moves.
effect.electric.name: Electric
effect.electric.desc: Deals 1 damage per turn. Lasts 1 turn.
tile.road.name: Road
tile.plain.name: Plain
tile.mountain.name: Mountain
tile.sand.name: Sand
tile.sand.desc: Costs 2 movement. Applies sand effect on entry.
tile.river.name: River
tile.river.desc: Costs 2 movement per tile. Cannot stop on it. Pushed in clears all effects and attributes.
tile.fire.name: Fire Tile
tile.fire.desc: Deals 2 damage per turn. Applies fire effect on entry.
tile.water.name: Water Tile
tile.water.desc: Removes fire and acid effects on entry.
tile.acid.name: Acid Tile
tile.acid.desc: Deals 1 damage per turn. Applies acid effect on entry.
tile.electric.name: Electric Tile
tile.electric.desc: Deals 1 damage per turn. Applies electric effect on entry.
tile.ice.name: Ice Tile
unit.m1.name: Frost Mage
unit.m1.desc: A long-range mage who fires arcane bolts and can freeze enemies with a one-time skill.
unit.k1.name: Iron Knight
unit.k1.desc: A heavily armored knight who knocks back enemies with every hit. Absorbs 2 damage passively.
unit.s1.name: Toxin Scout
unit.s1.desc: A light support unit who applies acid on attacks and can lob an acid bomb as a skill.
weapon.mage_basic.name: Arcane Bolt
weapon.mage_freeze.name: Frost Bolt
weapon.mage_freeze.desc: A freezing bolt that immobilizes the target for 1 turn. One use.
weapon.knight_basic.name: Shield Slam
weapon.knight_basic.desc: A powerful melee slam that knocks back the target.
weapon.support_basic.name: Acid Shot
weapon.support_basic.desc: A short-range shot that applies the acid effect on hit.
weapon.support_acid_bomb.name: Acid Bomb
weapon.support_acid_bomb.desc: Lobs an acid bomb that applies acid to all units in a 1-tile radius. One use.
skill.mage_freeze.name: Frost Bolt
skill.mage_freeze.desc: Fire a freezing bolt that immobilizes the target for 1 turn. One use.
skill.knight_taunt.name: Indomitable
skill.knight_taunt.desc: Passive. The knight's armor is always active.
skill.support_acid.name: Acid Bomb
skill.support_acid.desc: Lob an acid bomb dealing 1 damage and applying acid in a 1-tile radius. One use.
map.test_01.name: Test Map 01
map.test_01.desc: 2-player test map with mountains, a river, and sand tiles.
map.1v1_6v6.name: Battlefront (1v1 6v6)
map.1v1_6v6.desc: A large 16×16 battlefield for intense 1v1 matches with 6 units each.
map.2v2_6v6.name: Team Arena (2v2 6v6)
map.2v2_6v6.desc: A large 16×16 arena for team battles — 2 players per side, 3 units each.
